title: Rich Silky Norwegian Sardines Poke
description: A creamy, lacto-vegetarian-friendly Norwegian dish featuring silken mustard and sardines that can be prepared in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Drain liquid from the sardines and place them in a small bowl.
Add the sour cream, mustard, lemon juice, and chopped fresh dill to the bowl with the sardines.
Mix gently until the ingredients are well combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, use a small cookie scoop or your hands to shape the mixture into small nigiri shapes.
Serve the sardines poke immediately, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
